creator: az@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please fix "Date created" header.  28 November 2009 is enough.
Also in pkg-descr WWW section for project home page, but not for your
company (Rambler) page.
E.g WWW: http://search.cpan.org/~pepe/Devel-Backtrace/ - right one.

Also you can fix this issues for all your PRs curently in GNATS.
Thank you Andrei.
